Controls.Title: Firewalls
Controls.Description: Boundary and host-based firewall protections are configured and managed.

Controls.Title: Secure Configuration
Controls.Description: Security baselines and hardened configuration settings are applied and monitored.

Controls.Title: User Access Control
Controls.Description: Privileged access is controlled, reviewed, and secured with least privilege principles.

Controls.Title: Malware Protection
Controls.Description: Endpoint malware protections are enabled and centrally governed.

Controls.Title: Security Update Management
Controls.Description: Security updates are managed and validated for timely deployment.
